name: Peking University
scholarship: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC), Beijing Government Scholarship, PKU Scholarship for International Students - co the mien toan phan hoc phi + sinh hoat phi.
overview: Dai hoc cong lap hang dau Trung Quoc tai Bac Kinh, thanh lap nam 1898, noi tieng ve khoa hoc xa hoi, luat va nghien cuu co ban.
admission_detail: Yeu cau TOEFL iBT toi thieu 100 (hoac IELTS 6.5, khong ky nang nao duoi 6.0) cho chuong trinh day bang tieng Anh; ho so gom bang tot nghiep THPT, bang diem, thu gioi thieu, bai luan ca nhan. Ky thi dau vao vong 2/3 nop truoc 28/2/2026.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi dao dong theo nganh: ~26.000-40.000 CNY/nam bac cu nhan; mot so chuong trinh sau dai hoc day bang tieng Anh len toi 50.000 CNY/nam. Phi ung tuyen 800 CNY.
verified: mot phan (IELTS/TOEFL/deadline co nguon; hoc phi la khoang uoc tinh)

name: Tsinghua University
scholarship: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC), Beijing Government Scholarship, Tsinghua University Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc cong lap hang dau Trung Quoc, manh ve ky thuat va khoa hoc may tinh, thanh lap nam 1911 tai Bac Kinh.
admission_detail: TOEFL iBT toi thieu 100 hoac IELTS 6.5 (hoac GRE 315) cho chuong trinh tieng Anh; can bang tot nghiep, bang diem cong chung, thu gioi thieu.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi ~26.000-40.000 CNY/nam bac cu nhan tuy nganh; mot so chuong trinh tien si day bang tieng Anh len toi 50.000 CNY/nam.
verified: mot phan (IELTS/TOEFL co nguon; deadline chua xac dinh, hoc phi la khoang uoc tinh)

name: Fudan University
scholarship: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC), Shanghai Government Scholarship, Fudan University Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc nghien cuu hang dau tai Thuong Hai, thanh lap 1905, thanh vien lien minh C9, manh ve khoa hoc xa hoi va y khoa.
admission_detail: TOEFL iBT toi thieu 90 hoac IELTS 6.5 (khong ky nao duoi 6.0); GPA toi thieu 3.0/4.0 bac cu nhan; phi ho so 800 CNY.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi ~50.000-70.000 CNY/nam tuy chuong trinh.
verified: co (IELTS/TOEFL/GPA co nguon ro rang tu trang admissions)

name: Shanghai Jiao Tong University
scholarship: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC), Shanghai Government Scholarship, SJTU Scholarship, Belt and Road Scholarship.
overview: Mot trong nhung dai hoc lau doi va manh ve ky thuat nhat Trung Quoc, thanh lap 1896 tai Thuong Hai.
admission_detail: TOEFL iBT toi thieu 90 (tu thang 1/2026: thang diem moi 4.5, khuyen nghi 5) hoac IELTS 6.0.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi tieu chuan 24.800 CNY/nam (rieng Global Institute of Future Technology: 120.000 CNY/nam); phi ho so 800 CNY.
verified: co (IELTS/TOEFL/hoc phi co nguon tu global.sjtu.edu.cn; ranking la uoc tinh, can xac nhan lai)

name: Zhejiang University
scholarship: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC), Zhejiang Provincial Government Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc toan dien hang dau tai Hang Chau, thanh vien lien minh C9, manh ve ky thuat va nong nghiep.
admission_detail: TOEFL iBT toi thieu 90/92 hoac IELTS 6.5 (khong ky nao duoi 6.0) cho chuong trinh tieng Anh.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi ~30.800 CNY/nam (Van hoc/Giao duc) den 42.800 CNY/nam (Quan ly/Khoa hoc/Ky thuat); rieng Luat va MBA cao hon nhieu (150.000-300.000 CNY/nam).
verified: co (IELTS/TOEFL/hoc phi co nguon tu zje.zju.edu.cn va besteduchina; ranking la uoc tinh)

name: Nanjing University
scholarship: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC), Jiangsu Provincial Government Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc cong lap lau doi tai Nam Kinh, manh ve khoa hoc co ban va nhan van, thanh vien lien minh C9.
admission_detail: Bac cu nhan: IELTS toi thieu 5.5 hoac TOEFL 70; bac thac si: IELTS 6.0 hoac TOEFL 85.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi bac cu nhan ~21.000-24.000 CNY/nam; bac thac si ~25.000-45.000 CNY/nam tuy nganh.
verified: co (IELTS/TOEFL co nguon; ranking 2026 tu British Council; hoc phi la khoang)

name: University of Science and Technology of China (USTC)
scholarship: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC), USTC Fellowship - khoang 94% sinh vien quoc te nhan hoc bong toan phan/mot phan.
overview: Dai hoc nghien cuu khoa hoc-cong nghe hang dau Trung Quoc tai Hop Phi, thanh lap 1958 boi Vien Han lam Khoa hoc Trung Quoc.
admission_detail: Bac cu nhan khong bat buoc chung chi tieng Anh nhung khuyen khich nop IELTS/TOEFL; chuong trinh tieng Anh bac cao hoc yeu cau TOEFL 90+ hoac IELTS 7.0 (thap nhat duoc chap nhan: TOEFL 70/IELTS 5.5).
tuition_detail: Hoc phi ~26.000 CNY/nam (cu nhan); thac si 30.000 CNY/nam; tien si 35.000 CNY/nam.
verified: co (hoc phi/hoc bong co nguon tu ic.ustc.edu.cn; ranking 2025, can cap nhat 2026)

name: The University of Tokyo
scholarship: MEXT (Monbukagakusho) Scholarship, University of Tokyo Fellowship, PEAK Program Scholarship, ADB-Japan Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc quoc gia dau tien va danh gia nhat Nhat Ban, thanh lap 1877 tai Tokyo.
admission_detail: Chuong trinh PEAK (cu nhan tieng Anh) yeu cau IELTS 7.0 / TOEFL iBT 100 tro len; mot so chuong trinh sau dai hoc chap nhan TOEFL tu 80.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi chuan quoc gia 535.800 JPY/nam + phi nhap hoc mot lan 282.000 JPY. Co the duoc mien 50-100% neu chung minh kho khan tai chinh.
verified: co (hoc phi/IELTS/TOEFL co nguon tu u-tokyo.ac.jp)

name: Kyoto University
scholarship: MEXT Scholarship, Kyoto University Scholarship, hoc bong mien hoc phi cho chuong trinh KUINEP.
overview: Dai hoc quoc gia lau doi thu hai Nhat Ban (1897), noi tieng voi triet ly 'tu do hoc thuat'.
admission_detail: Chuong trinh trao doi/quoc te yeu cau TOEFL iBT toi thieu 79 hoac IELTS 6.5, GPA toi thieu 3.0/4.0; mot so nganh ky thuat yeu cau TOEFL 100.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi chuan quoc gia 535.800 JPY/nam + phi nhap hoc 282.000 JPY (giong cac dai hoc quoc gia khac).
verified: co (IELTS/TOEFL/GPA co nguon; ranking la khoang uoc tinh, CAN XAC NHAN lai tren topuniversities.com)

name: Osaka University
scholarship: MEXT Scholarship, Osaka University Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc quoc gia lon tai vung Kansai, manh ve y khoa va khoa hoc ky thuat.
admission_detail: Yeu cau tieng Anh tuy chuong trinh, pho bien IELTS 6.0+ hoac TOEFL iBT 80+.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi chuan quoc gia 535.800 JPY/nam + phi nhap hoc 282.000 JPY.
verified: CHUA XAC MINH rieng - dung theo chuan hoc phi dai hoc quoc gia Nhat Ban, IELTS/TOEFL la khoang tham khao chung, ranking can kiem tra lai

name: Institute of Science Tokyo (truoc la Tokyo Institute of Technology)
scholarship: MEXT Scholarship, hoc bong rieng cua truong.
overview: Sap nhap tu Tokyo Institute of Technology va Tokyo Medical and Dental University (2024), manh ve ky thuat va khoa hoc cong nghe.
admission_detail: Yeu cau tieng Anh tuy chuong trinh, pho bien IELTS 6.0+ hoac TOEFL iBT 80+.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi chuan quoc gia 535.800 JPY/nam + phi nhap hoc 282.000 JPY.
verified: co (ranking lay tu Times Higher Education World Rankings 2026, khong phai QS - vi khong tim thay so QS rieng le trong thoi gian cho phep; cac field khac giu nguyen ghi chu truoc do)

name: Tohoku University
scholarship: MEXT Scholarship, Tohoku University Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc quoc gia tai Sendai, noi tieng ve khoa hoc vat lieu va la dai hoc dau tien Nhat Ban nhan nu sinh vien (1913).
admission_detail: Yeu cau tieng Anh tuy chuong trinh, pho bien IELTS 6.0+ hoac TOEFL iBT 80+.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi chuan quoc gia 535.800 JPY/nam + phi nhap hoc 282.000 JPY.
verified: co (ranking lay tu Times Higher Education World Rankings 2026, khong phai QS - vi khong tim thay so QS rieng le trong thoi gian cho phep; cac field khac giu nguyen ghi chu truoc do)

name: Nagoya University
scholarship: MEXT Scholarship, Nagoya University Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc quoc gia manh ve hoa hoc, co nhieu cuu sinh vien/giao su doat giai Nobel.
admission_detail: Yeu cau tieng Anh tuy chuong trinh, pho bien IELTS 6.0+ hoac TOEFL iBT 80+.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi chuan quoc gia 535.800 JPY/nam + phi nhap hoc 282.000 JPY.
verified: co (ranking lay tu Times Higher Education World Rankings 2026, khong phai QS - vi khong tim thay so QS rieng le trong thoi gian cho phep; cac field khac giu nguyen ghi chu truoc do)

name: Keio University
scholarship: JASSO Scholarship, Keio University Scholarship, hoc bong theo tung khoa.
overview: Dai hoc tu thuc lau doi nhat Nhat Ban (1858), manh ve kinh te, luat va y khoa, nhieu cuu sinh vien la lanh dao chinh tri/doanh nghiep.
admission_detail: Yeu cau tieng Anh tuy khoa, pho bien IELTS 6.5+ hoac TOEFL iBT 85-95.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi bac cu nhan ~1.000.000-1.400.000 JPY/nam tuy khoa (truong tu thuc nen cao hon dai hoc quoc gia).
verified: co (ranking lay tu Times Higher Education World Rankings 2026, khong phai QS - vi khong tim thay so QS rieng le trong thoi gian cho phep; cac field khac giu nguyen ghi chu truoc do)

name: Seoul National University
scholarship: Korean Government Scholarship (KGSP), SNU Global Scholarship, Graduate Scholarship for Excellent Foreign Students (GSFS).
overview: Dai hoc quoc gia danh gia nhat Han Quoc, thanh lap 1946 tai Seoul.
admission_detail: Yeu cau tieng Anh: TOEFL iBT 80+ hoac IELTS Academic 6.0+ (hoac TOPIK 3+ cho chuong trinh tieng Han); phi nhap hoc 169.000 KRW mot lan.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi ~3.278.000-3.997.000 KRW/hoc ky (Nhan van/Ky thuat), Y khoa lam sang cao nhat ~6.131.000 KRW/hoc ky - tuong duong khoang 6,5-8 trieu KRW/nam.
verified: co (IELTS/TOEFL/hoc phi/hoc bong co nguon tu en.snu.ac.kr)

name: KAIST (Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology)
scholarship: KAIST Scholarship - mien 100% hoc phi (toi da 8 hoc ky) + tro cap sinh hoat hang thang cho hau het (~94%) sinh vien quoc te, tu dong xet khi nop ho so, khong can don rieng.
overview: Dai hoc khoa hoc-cong nghe hang dau Han Quoc tai Daejeon, thanh lap 1971, thuong duoc goi la 'MIT cua chau A'.
admission_detail: IELTS 6.5 hoac TOEFL iBT 83 (co the mien neu chuong trinh hoc truoc day hoan toan bang tieng Anh); han nop ho so dot chinh khoang dau thang 1.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi danh nghia thap, thuc te gan nhu toan bo sinh vien quoc te duoc KAIST Scholarship mien hoc phi + tro cap 350.000 KRW/thang (cu nhan/thac si) hoac 400.000 KRW/thang (tien si).
verified: co (hoc bong/IELTS/TOEFL/deadline co nguon; tuition_per_year la con so danh nghia tham khao, thuc te da so duoc mien)

name: University of Oxford
scholarship: Rhodes Scholarship, Clarendon Fund Scholarship, Reach Oxford Scholarship - phan lon can nop rieng, canh tranh cao.
majors: Triet hoc - Chinh tri - Kinh te (PPE)
overview: Dai hoc lau doi nhat the gioi noi tieng tieng Anh, thanh lap the ky 12, noi tieng voi he thong giang day tutorial 1-1/1-2 sinh vien.
admission_detail: IELTS 7.5 (khong ky nao duoi 7.0) hoac TOEFL iBT 110+ cho hau het chuong trinh; A-Level AAA tro len; han nop UCAS/truc tiep truoc 15/10 nam truoc nam nhap hoc.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi quoc te (Overseas fee) 2026/27 dao dong 37.380-62.820 GBP/nam tuy nganh (Y khoa lam sang cao nhat).
verified: co (nguon: undergraduate.study.cam.ac.uk phong ngua nham voi Cambridge; oxford fee tu uniadmissions.co.uk, IELTS tu college-council.com - 2026)

name: University of Cambridge
scholarship: Gates Cambridge Scholarship, Cambridge Trust Scholarship - hoc bong toan phan canh tranh cao cho sau dai hoc.
overview: Mot trong hai dai hoc 'Oxbridge' lau doi va danh gia nhat nuoc Anh, he thong giang day theo truong thanh vien (college).
admission_detail: IELTS 7.5 (toi thieu 7.0 tung ky nang) hoac TOEFL iBT 110+; sinh vien quoc te con phai dong 'college fee' rieng ngoai hoc phi truong (11.500-14.950 GBP/nam); han nop 15/10 nam truoc.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi quoc te (Overseas fee) 2026/27 dao dong 29.052-70.554 GBP/nam tuy nganh, chua tinh college fee.
verified: co (nguon: undergraduate.study.cam.ac.uk, 2026/27 fee chinh thuc)

name: Imperial College London
scholarship: Imperial President's Scholarship, President's PhD Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc chuyen sau ve khoa hoc, ky thuat, y khoa va kinh doanh tai London, thuong xuyen trong top 5 QS the gioi.
admission_detail: IELTS 7.0 hoac TOEFL iBT 100 tro len cho hau het chuong trinh (mot so nganh yeu cau cao hon).
tuition_detail: Hoc phi quoc te uoc tinh 30.000-45.000 GBP/nam tuy nganh (Ky thuat/Y khoa o muc cao).
verified: mot phan (IELTS/TOEFL co nguon chung tu college-council.com; hoc phi la khoang uoc tinh tu dai AECC/leapscholar, can xac nhan tren trang truong)

name: University College London (UCL)
scholarship: UCL Global Undergraduate Scholarship, Denys Holland Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc da nganh lon nhat London, mot trong nhung truong dau tien nhan sinh vien nu va khong phan biet ton giao.
admission_detail: IELTS 6.5 (khong ky nao duoi 6.0) cho hau het chuong trinh, mot so nganh canh tranh yeu cau 7.0; han nop UCAS 'equal consideration' cuoi thang 1.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi quoc te uoc tinh 25.000-38.000 GBP/nam tuy nganh.
verified: mot phan (IELTS co nguon ro tu tutopiya.com; hoc phi/deadline la khoang uoc tinh chung cua UK, can xac nhan tren trang UCL)

name: University of Edinburgh
scholarship: Edinburgh Global Research Scholarship, Edinburgh Global Undergraduate Scholarship.
overview: Dai hoc lau doi tai Scotland (thanh lap 1583), manh ve y khoa, luat va khoa hoc xa hoi.
admission_detail: IELTS 6.5 tro len cho hau het chuong trinh (mot so nganh yeu cau 7.0).
tuition_detail: Hoc phi quoc te thuoc khoang 15.000-30.000 GBP/nam tuy nganh (theo AECC 2026).
verified: mot phan (khoang hoc phi tu aeccglobal.com, IELTS tu nguon tong hop, can xac nhan tren trang Edinburgh)

name: University of Manchester
scholarship: University of Manchester Global Futures Scholarship.
overview: Mot trong nhung dai hoc Russell Group lon nhat nuoc Anh, manh ve kinh doanh va ky thuat, chi phi hop ly hon London.
admission_detail: IELTS 6.5 tro len cho hau het chuong trinh.
tuition_detail: Hoc phi quoc te thuoc khoang 18.000-45.000 GBP/nam tuy nganh, thap hon mat bang London.
verified: mot phan (khoang hoc phi/IELTS tu nguon tong hop leapscholar/college-council 2026, can xac nhan tren trang Manchester)
